text: Standing just outside the glass-walled meeting room, I feel a certain stillness—an anticipatory hush, as if ideas are waiting to spill forth once the chairs are filled. Moving into the R+D space, colors and words envelop me. Here, surrounded by lively dialogue between human curiosity and innovation, I am intrigued by the restless energy of research and the playful promise of discovery. This place invites contemplation and engagement—every display whispers that progress is not only possible but already unfolding around me. I feel curious, slightly humbled, and eager to linger in the exchange between what is known and what is yet to emerge.
